LanguageData.ATPP_NanitesHydraulicSerum.label: Nanites Bank (Hydraulic)
LanguageData.ATPP_NanitesHydraulicSerum.description: A one-use bank of nanites tuned to repair broken android hydraulic systems (related to old age).
LanguageData.ATPP_NanitesHydraulicSerum.comps.CompUsa: Use this nanite serum to fix android age issues
LanguageData.ATPP_NanitesCPUSerum.label: Nanites Bank (CPU)
LanguageData.ATPP_NanitesCPUSerum.description: A one-use bank of nanites tuned to repair broken android artificial brain systems (related to old age).
LanguageData.ATPP_NanitesCPUSerum.comps.CompUsable.us: Use this nanite serum to fix android age issues
LanguageData.ATPP_NanitesCoolingSerum.label: Nanites Bank (Cooling)
LanguageData.ATPP_NanitesCoolingSerum.description: A one-use bank of nanites tuned to repair broken android cooling systems in case of overheating (related to old age).
LanguageData.ATPP_NanitesCoolingSerum.comps.CompUsabl: Use this nanite serum to fix android age issues
LanguageData.ATPP_NanitesFrameSerum.label: Nanites Bank (Framework)
LanguageData.ATPP_NanitesFrameSerum.description: A one-use bank of nanites tuned to repair broken android exoskeletons (related to old age).
Use this nanite serum to fix android age issues
LanguageData.ATPP_AndroidNanokitBasic.label: Basic Nanokit
LanguageData.ATPP_AndroidNanokitBasic.description: A kit containing nanobots to treat the wounds of androids.
LanguageData.ATPP_AndroidNanokitIntermediate.label: Intermediate Nanokit
LanguageData.ATPP_AndroidNanokitIntermediate.descript: A kit containing nanobots to treat the wounds of androids.
LanguageData.ATPP_AndroidNanokitAdvanced.label: Advanced Nanokit
LanguageData.ATPP_AndroidNanokitAdvanced.description: A kit containing nanobots to treat the wounds of androids.
LanguageData.ATPP_RXChip.label: RX Neural Chip
LanguageData.ATPP_RXChip.description: A neural chip acting as a personal SkyMind relay, allowing the host to connect to the SkyMind network without a nearby terminal.
LanguageData.ATPP_VX0Chip.label: VX0 Neural Chip
LanguageData.ATPP_VX0Chip.description: A neural chip which transforms its host into a biological surrogate, allowing a remote operator to take direct control through the SkyMind network.
LanguageData.ATPP_VX1Chip.label: VX1 Neural Chip
LanguageData.ATPP_VX1Chip.description: A neural chip allowing its host to remotely control any SX series android or biological surrogate through the SkyMind network.
LanguageData.ATPP_VX2Chip.label: VX2 Neural Chip
LanguageData.ATPP_VX2Chip.description: A neural chip allowing its host to remotely control any SX series android or biological surrogate and transfer or duplicate their consciousness through the SkyMind network.
LanguageData.ATPP_VX3Chip.label: VX3 Neural Chip
LanguageData.ATPP_VX3Chip.description: A neural chip allowing its host to simultaneously control multiple SX series androids or biological surrogates and transfer or duplicate their consciousness through the SkyMind network.
LanguageData.ATPP_T1ArtificialBrain.label: Artificial Brain T1
LanguageData.ATPP_T1ArtificialBrain.description: An artificial T1 brain, allowing a T1 surrogate to be transformed into a blank neural network android.
LanguageData.ATPP_T2ArtificialBrain.label: Artificial Brain T2
LanguageData.ATPP_T2ArtificialBrain.description: An artificial T2 brain, allowing a T2 surrogate to be transformed into a blank neural network android.
LanguageData.ATPP_T3ArtificialBrain.label: Artificial Brain T3
LanguageData.ATPP_T3ArtificialBrain.description: An artificial T3 brain, allowing a T3 surrogate to be transformed into a blank neural network android.
LanguageData.ATPP_T4ArtificialBrain.label: Artificial Brain T4
LanguageData.ATPP_T4ArtificialBrain.description: An artificial T4 brain, allowing a T4 surrogate to be transformed into a blank neural network android.
LanguageData.SteelPlating.label: steel framing
LanguageData.SteelPlating.description: A simple steel frame reinforcement for androids, providing modest structural protection against damage. Can be installed on T1–T5 Androids, K9 Unit, and M.U.F.F Unit.
LanguageData.PlasteelPlating.label: plasteel frame coverings
LanguageData.PlasteelPlating.description: Plasteel coverings installed over structural weak points on the android's frame, substantially increasing damage resistance. Can be installed on T2–T5 Androids, K9 Unit, and M.U.F.F Unit.
LanguageData.CompositePlating.label: composite frame plating
LanguageData.CompositePlating.description: High-tensile composite frame plating offering excellent structural protection. Can be installed on T3–T5 Androids, K9 Unit, and M.U.F.F Unit.
LanguageData.HydraulicFrame.label: hydraulic frame
LanguageData.HydraulicFrame.description: Enhances the android's framework using high-power hydraulic pumps, increasing carrying capacity. Movement is somewhat restricted due to the additional bulk. Can be installed on T1–T5 Androids, K9 Unit, and M.U.F.F Unit.
LanguageData.HydraulicLeg.label: hydraulic leg
LanguageData.HydraulicLeg.description: A tough hydraulic leg replacement that increases carrying capacity at the expense of agility. Can be installed on T1–T5 Androids, K9 Unit, and M.U.F.F Unit.
LanguageData.HydraulicArm.label: hydraulic arm
LanguageData.HydraulicArm.description: A tough hydraulic arm replacement that increases carrying capacity and melee strength at the expense of agility. Can be installed on T1–T5 Androids.
LanguageData.MiningArm_AT.label: mining arm
LanguageData.MiningArm_AT.description: A large plasteel-tipped drill arm used widely during the asteroid rush of the 22nd century. Excellent for mining but unsuitable for delicate work. Can be installed on T2–T5 Androids.
LanguageData.BasicReplacementArm.label: basic replacement arm
LanguageData.BasicReplacementArm.description: A mass-produced replacement arm, standard issue for large android armies on warring planets. Can be installed on T1–T5 Androids.
LanguageData.BasicReplacementLeg.label: basic replacement leg
LanguageData.BasicReplacementLeg.description: A mass-produced replacement leg, standard issue for large android armies on warring planets. Can be installed on T1–T5 Androids, K9 Unit, and M.U.F.F Unit.
LanguageData.CrudeHeatsink.label: crude heatsink
LanguageData.CrudeHeatsink.description: A very basic heatsink made from scrap metal roughly arranged into a heat-dissipating array. Can be installed on T1–T5 Androids, K9 Unit, and M.U.F.F Unit.
LanguageData.LightReceivingDiode.label: crude light sensor
LanguageData.LightReceivingDiode.description: A basic light detection diode that functions as a simple on/off switch based on ambient light. Can be installed on T1–T5 Androids.
LanguageData.FlimsyCoolantPump.label: crude coolant pump
LanguageData.FlimsyCoolantPump.description: A flimsy differential-pressure coolant pump that barely maintains adequate coolant flow. Can be installed on T1–T5 Androids, K9 Unit, and M.U.F.F Unit.
LanguageData.SmallBatteryPack.label: crude battery pack
LanguageData.SmallBatteryPack.description: An array of small batteries lined up end-to-end for maximum voltage — which is still not very much. Can be installed on T1–T5 Androids, K9 Unit, and M.U.F.F Unit.
LanguageData.TubeSealantTank.label: crude mechanite storage
LanguageData.TubeSealantTank.description: A small tank holding a gel-like sealant fluid that plugs holes in the android's internal tubing as it flows through. Can be installed on T1–T5 Androids, K9 Unit, and M.U.F.F Unit.
LanguageData.LowPowerTransformer.label: crude bio-reactor
LanguageData.LowPowerTransformer.description: A highly inefficient bio-processor that can only extract energy from the cellulose of organic matter. Can be installed on T1–T5 Androids, K9 Unit, and M.U.F.F Unit.
LanguageData.BasicDCConverter.label: crude power converter
LanguageData.BasicDCConverter.description: A simple AC/DC power converter that only effectively works in one direction. Can be installed on T1–T5 Androids, K9 Unit, and M.U.F.F Unit.
LanguageData.AdvancedReplacementArm.label: high power arm
LanguageData.AdvancedReplacementArm.description: An extremely tough and strong arm built for heavy-duty workloads: construction, warfare, or post-disaster rescue. Can be installed on T2–T5 Androids.
LanguageData.AdvancedReplacementLeg.label: high power leg
LanguageData.AdvancedReplacementLeg.description: A high-speed leg developed with performance in mind, widely used by Android Olympic runners on glitterworlds. Can be installed on T2–T5 Androids.
LanguageData.MultiSpectrumEye.label: advanced light sensor
LanguageData.MultiSpectrumEye.description: An advanced eye sensor that lets the android switch between infrared, X-ray, and ultraviolet vision modes, far beyond factory standard visual range. Can be installed on T3–T5 Androids.
LanguageData.MultiLayerHeatsink.label: advanced heatsink
LanguageData.MultiLayerHeatsink.description: A multi-layer heatsink composed of different materials for maximum heat transfer efficiency. Can be installed on T3–T5 Androids.
LanguageData.AdvancedCoolantInjector.label: advanced coolant pump
LanguageData.AdvancedCoolantInjector.description: A continuous high-pressure coolant injector that replaces the inefficient pulsed pumping of cruder models. Can be installed on T3–T5 Androids.
LanguageData.NanowireBattery.label: advanced battery pack
LanguageData.NanowireBattery.description: A nanowire battery using meshed layers of gold and plasteel to achieve maximum energy density and output. Can be installed on T3–T5 Androids.
LanguageData.NaniteStorageDevice.label: advanced mechanite storage
LanguageData.NaniteStorageDevice.description: Releases nanites into the android's coolant stream for rapid component repair and recovery from malicious viruses. Increases android healing rate by 30%. Can be installed on T3–T5 Androids.
LanguageData.HighPowerTransformer.label: advanced bio-reactor
LanguageData.HighPowerTransformer.description: A high-efficiency bio-processor capable of converting most organic matter into energy with minimal waste. Can be installed on T3–T5 Androids.
LanguageData.HighPowerConverter.label: advanced power converter
LanguageData.HighPowerConverter.description: An advanced power converter operating at near 99.9% conversion efficiency with instantaneous signal manipulation. Can be installed on T3–T5 Androids.
LanguageData.BasicRearCounterweight.label: basic counterweight
LanguageData.BasicRearCounterweight.description: A crude counterweight consisting of a large steel ball on the end of a rod. Can be installed on K9 Cybernetic Unit.
LanguageData.AdvRearCounterweight.label: advanced counterweight
LanguageData.AdvRearCounterweight.description: A gyroscopic counterweight providing much greater stability and efficiency than its basic counterpart. Can be installed on K9 Cybernetic Unit.
LanguageData.CrudeJawAndroid.label: crude jaw
LanguageData.CrudeJawAndroid.description: A flimsy, weak jaw with poor bite force. Can be installed on K9 Cybernetic Unit.
LanguageData.AdvJawAndroid.label: cybernetic jaw
LanguageData.AdvJawAndroid.description: An incredibly powerful jaw capable of crushing bone with ease. A terrifying upgrade for any K9 unit. Can be installed on K9 Cybernetic Unit.
LanguageData.PositronMindImplant.label: positronic rewiring
LanguageData.PositronMindImplant.description: Replaces standard brain wiring with high-efficiency positronic pathways, dramatically improving cognitive processing speed. Can be installed on T1–T5 Androids.
LanguageData.SoldierMindImplant.label: soldier implant
LanguageData.SoldierMindImplant.description: Allows the android to perceive projectile trajectories in real time and run internal war simulations for improved combat performance. Can be installed on T1–T5 Androids.
LanguageData.BuilderMindImplant.label: blueprints implant
LanguageData.BuilderMindImplant.description: Stores multiple banks of construction blueprints in the AI core, substantially improving the android's building speed and accuracy. Can be installed on T1–T5 Androids.
LanguageData.SurgeonMindImplant.label: tricorder implant
LanguageData.SurgeonMindImplant.description: A miniaturized tricorder allowing the android to scan biological creatures and determine a medical diagnosis at a glance. Can be installed on T1–T5 Androids.
LanguageData.SpeedMindImplant.label: neural highways
LanguageData.SpeedMindImplant.description: Remaps the android's neural pathways into high-speed signal highways, increasing processing speed across all tasks. Can be installed on T1–T5 Androids.
LanguageData.GeoMindImplant.label: geological implant
LanguageData.GeoMindImplant.description: Overlays an augmented view of rock faces with real-time guidance on the most efficient extraction paths, greatly improving mining speed. Can be installed on T1–T5 Androids.
LanguageData.MechanicMindImplant.label: engineering implant
LanguageData.MechanicMindImplant.description: Aids the android in all mechanical tasks, boosting android surgery success rates and mechanoid disassembly efficiency. Can be installed on T1–T5 Androids.
LanguageData.CookingMindImplant.label: cuisine implant
LanguageData.CookingMindImplant.description: Automatically uploads culinary knowledge and food safety protocols, improving cooking quality and variety. Used in glitterworld restaurants for VIP service. Can be installed on T1–T5 Androids.
LanguageData.CharismaMindImplant.label: charisma implant
LanguageData.CharismaMindImplant.description: Enhances the android's ability to detect micro-expressions in voices and body language, improving social interactions and negotiation. Can be installed on T1–T5 Androids.
LanguageData.NegotiationMindImplant.label: negotiator implant
LanguageData.NegotiationMindImplant.description: Aids in negotiation across a wide range of scenarios including interrogation and trade. Standard equipment in law enforcement android models. Can be installed on T1–T5 Androids.
LanguageData.AnimalMindImplant.label: zoology implant
LanguageData.AnimalMindImplant.description: Enhances the android's ability to read animal emotions in depth, improving taming success and animal handling. Can be installed on T1–T5 Androids.
LanguageData.FarmingMindImplant.label: agricultural implant
LanguageData.FarmingMindImplant.description: Adds an augmented view displaying soil mineral content and crop health via spectrographic scans emitted from around the eye. Can be installed on T1–T5 Androids.
LanguageData.BasicLaborMindImplant.label: basic labor chip
LanguageData.BasicLaborMindImplant.description: The standard factory android chip, teaching more efficient techniques for general labor tasks across all work categories. Can be installed on T1–T5 Androids.
LanguageData.EvolvingImplant.label: evolving AI upgrade
LanguageData.EvolvingImplant.description: A self-improving AI module that gradually enhances all capabilities over time through continuous learning, eventually reaching peak efficiency. Can be installed on T1–T5 Androids.
LanguageData.CyberReplacementArm.label: cybernetic arm
LanguageData.CyberReplacementArm.description: An arm made from Ultraweave composites developed by the most advanced glitterworld societies. Exceptionally strong and durable. Can be installed on T4–T5 Androids.
LanguageData.CyberReplacementLeg.label: cybernetic leg
LanguageData.CyberReplacementLeg.description: A rare leg upgrade that provides immense speed and strength, rarely seen outside a laboratory. Can be installed on T4–T5 Androids.
LanguageData.SecretHeatsink.label: archotech heatsink
LanguageData.SecretHeatsink.description: A near-perfect heatsink that radiates heat at approximately 99% efficiency, practically ejecting thermal energy. Can be installed on T4–T5 Androids.
LanguageData.MDEye.label: archotech light sensor
LanguageData.MDEye.description: An eye that can switch between 3D and 4D vision, allowing the android to predict movement patterns with pinpoint accuracy as if seeing events before they happen. Can be installed on T4–T5 Androids.
LanguageData.SecretCoolantPump.label: archotech coolant pump
LanguageData.SecretCoolantPump.description: A coolant injector with an extraordinary operating range, functional even at near absolute zero temperatures. Can be installed on T4–T5 Androids.
LanguageData.SecretBatteryPack.label: archotech battery pack
LanguageData.SecretBatteryPack.description: Inspired by Vanometric power generation, this battery achieves far greater charge capacity than any predecessor. Can be installed on T4–T5 Androids.
LanguageData.ArchotechNanites.label: archotech mechanite storage
LanguageData.ArchotechNanites.description: A compartment of archotech nanites whose inner workings remain a mystery even to advanced cultures. What is known: their repair capabilities are exceptional. Increases android healing rate by 60%. Can be installed on T4–T5 Androids.
LanguageData.MolecularDecomposer.label: archotech bio-reactor
LanguageData.MolecularDecomposer.description: A reactor that converts consumed material at the molecular level for extraordinary conversion efficiency, making other bio-reactors look primitive. Can be installed on T4–T5 Androids.
LanguageData.QuantumConverter.label: archotech power converter
LanguageData.QuantumConverter.description: A highly advanced zero-point energy converter that transfers electrical energy throughout the body at 100% efficiency. Can be installed on T4–T5 Androids.
LanguageData.CrudeHearingS.label: crude hearing sensor
LanguageData.CrudeHearingS.description: A basic sound interpretation implant that can only process fundamental audio frequencies. Can be installed on T1–T5 Androids.
LanguageData.AdvHearingS.label: advanced hearing sensor
LanguageData.AdvHearingS.description: A precision hearing sensor accurate up to one kilometer, capable of detecting the faintest sounds. Can be installed on T3–T5 Androids.
LanguageData.ArchHearingS.label: archotech hearing sensor
LanguageData.ArchHearingS.description: The pinnacle of sound detection technology, capable of detecting all frequencies with potentially unlimited range. Can be installed on T4–T5 Androids.
LanguageData.CrudeSmellingS.label: crude smelling sensor
LanguageData.CrudeSmellingS.description: A basic olfactory implant that can detect only the most fundamental smells, with marginal ventilation improvement. Can be installed on T1–T5 Androids.
LanguageData.SmellingAdvS.label: advanced smelling sensor
LanguageData.SmellingAdvS.description: An advanced olfactory sensor with widened openings for improved odor detection and ventilation. Can be installed on T2–T5 Androids.
LanguageData.ArchSmellingS.label: archotech smelling sensor
LanguageData.ArchSmellingS.description: The pinnacle of olfactory technology, capable of detecting all smell ranges with unlimited sensitivity and greatly improved air ventilation. Can be installed on T4–T5 Androids.
LanguageData.Backstory_PitFighterUpgradeItem.label: pit gauntlet
LanguageData.Backstory_PitFighterUpgradeItem.descript: A custom hand implant with three hydraulic spikes and a heavy metal plate covering the back of the hand, given to this android as a mark of their fame as a pit fighter.
LanguageData.Backstory_HighCouncilUpgradeItem.label: quantum mind
LanguageData.Backstory_HighCouncilUpgradeItem.descrip: A highly exotic artificial mind upgrade that reportedly uses quantum tunnelling to read the neural patterns of nearby speakers before they even form thoughts into words.
LanguageData.Backstory_TranscendantAssimilatorUpgrade: Two permanently extended forearm blades of immense weight. When activated, they heat to white-hot temperatures that convert surrounding air into plasma using technology unlike anything seen before.
LanguageData.RepairKitAT.label: upgrade kit
LanguageData.RepairKitAT.description: A specialized kit containing tools and materials for repairing and modifying androids.
LanguageData.AndroidT1Kit.label: android assembly kit
LanguageData.AndroidT1Kit.description: Contains the disassembled parts of a T1 android packed for efficient transport, along with clear assembly instructions simple enough for anyone to follow.
LanguageData.AndroidT2Kit.label: adv android assembly kit
LanguageData.AndroidT2Kit.description: Contains the disassembled parts of a T2 android packed for efficient transport, along with clear assembly instructions simple enough for anyone to follow.
LanguageData.Nanoswarm_shell.label: swarm shell
LanguageData.Nanoswarm_shell.description: A pressurized shell filled with micro-scythers — tiny drones programmed to seek out and kill nearby targets after detonation.
LanguageData.ChemicalEgg.label: chemical capsule
LanguageData.ChemicalEgg.description: A hard capsule filled with processed hydrocarbons and other chemicals. Can be refined into neutroamine or chemfuel at a drug lab or refinery.
LanguageData.SteelWool.label: metallic wool
LanguageData.SteelWool.description: Faux wool made of long metallic strands produced by the phytomining unit. Primarily used for smelting into steel, but can also be woven into heavy clothing. Human colonists wearing it will suffer mood debuffs unless they are masochists; androids are unaffected.
LanguageData.NSolution.label: nutrient solution
LanguageData.NSolution.description: An oily, calorie-dense substance extracted from the N.Solution unit. Easy to store and nutritious, though not particularly appetizing.
LanguageData.Mech40MMCannon.label: 40mm cannon
LanguageData.Mech40MMCannon.description: A factory-standard weapon mounted on every M7 Mech during production. Capable of burst-firing three 80kg rounds in quick succession, designed for anti-material and mech-vs-mech combat.
LanguageData.MechMastiffGun.label: mastiff shotgun
LanguageData.MechMastiffGun.description: A mech shotgun that chills its specialized pellets to below -100°C before firing. The extreme cold makes the pellets brittle, causing them to shatter inside the target on impact for devastating internal damage.
LanguageData.MechHandCannon.label: hand cannon
LanguageData.MechHandCannon.description: The X-5 Pistol, known as the 'hand cannon', is a semi-automatic handgun with specialized rifling that fires rounds at immense velocity, dealing severe damage to both mechanical and biological targets.
LanguageData.MeleeWeapon_MechKnife.label: mech blade
LanguageData.MeleeWeapon_MechKnife.description: A long, heavy blade made from 3-inch thick titanium, providing devastating melee capability to any mech unit that wields it.
LanguageData.AntiMechRifle.label: anti-mech rifle
LanguageData.AntiMechRifle.description: A massive, purpose-built rifle designed to take down mechanized infantry. Its high stopping power deals devastating damage to even the largest opponents.
